en: Are you worried about making mistakes in English? Are you scared people will judge you, so you just don't speak at all?
ko: 영어 실수가 걱정되나요? 남들이 평가할까 봐 무서워서 아예 말을 안 하나요?

en: Try these tips. Firstly, and this one is my favourite because it helped me a lot when I was learning Spanish, try a language exchange.
ko: 이 팁을 써보세요. 먼저, 스페인어 배울 때 정말 도움이 된 건 언어 교환이에요.

en: Find an English speaker who wants to practice your first language and have a conversation. You're in the same situation, so you can both make mistakes without judgement.
ko: 당신의 모국어를 연습하고 싶은 영어 원어민을 찾아 대화하세요. 같은 처지니까 서로 편하게 실수할 수 있어요.

en: Make a joke out of your mistakes and have fun. Secondly, to get used to making mistakes, give yourself an everyday topic, like food or a typical weekend.
ko: 실수를 농담으로 만들고 즐기세요. 둘째, 실수에 익숙해지려면 일상 주제를 정하세요.

en: Set a timer for 30 seconds or even a minute and challenge yourself to talk about it without stopping and without thinking about your mistakes.
ko: 30초나 1분 타이머를 맞추고 실수를 생각하지 말고 멈추지 않고 말해보세요.

en: Let the language flow. Number three, change the way you think about mistakes. Making mistakes helps us learn and get better.
ko: 언어가 흐르게 하세요. 셋째, 실수에 대한 생각을 바꾸세요. 실수가 배우고 나아지게 해줍니다.

en: And remember, speaking is about communication, not perfection.
ko: 그리고 말하기는 완벽함이 아니라 소통이라는 걸 기억하세요.

en: Now, we've just made a podcast series about speaking anxiety, all the fears that come with speaking a foreign language and how to fight them.
ko: 외국어 말하기의 모든 두려움과 극복법에 관한 팟캐스트 시리즈를 만들었어요.

en: Learn from experts and other learners like you in beating speaking anxiety. Find more on our website bbclearningenglish.com.
ko: 전문가와 다른 학습자에게 배우세요. bbclearningenglish.com에서 더 찾아보세요.

en: And how do you feel when speaking English? Let us know in the comments.
ko: 영어 말할 때 기분이 어떤지 댓글로 알려주세요.
